meaning: adj.[化]硫磺的,含多量硫磺的
examples: These are immersed in an electrolyte of dilute sulphuric acid.
They are composed largely of (80% concentration) sulphuric acid.
In 2005 world production of sulphuric acid was estimated at 193 million tonnes.
Sulphuric acid was thrown in Mr Filin's face outside his home in Moscow on 17 January.
Then he discovered an ailing state-owned sulphuric-acid factory in the city of Jinzhou.
